ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who took the test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical test */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the medical test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who ordered the test */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_tests_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "histopathological_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each histopathological image */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical test associated with the image */,
  "image_file" TEXT /* File path to the histopathological image */,
  "image_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was taken */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., MRI, X-ray) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_histopathological_images_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES medical_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnosis_outcomes" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis outcome */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the diagnosis outcome */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis outcome (e.g., benign, malignant) */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date when the diagnosis was made */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who made the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the diagnosis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the diagnosis record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the diagnosis record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnosis_outcomes_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnosis_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, researcher, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the doctor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the doctor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the doctor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the doctor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the doctor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the doctor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the treatment plan */,
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnosis associated with the treatment plan */,
  "treatment_details" TEXT /* Details of the treatment plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who created the treatment plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the treatment plan record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the treatment plan record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_diagnosis_id FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosis_id") REFERENCES diagnosis_outcomes ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)
